title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Perona, Whitebeard, Brook, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Whitebeard, Brook, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: TH-THAT'S A lie! Luffy was caught too....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Didn't they run all the way here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't say it!! Just don't say it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The bride won't come for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She won't come for you either.
